attributes.accessibilityText: Google Play services notification: Security Alert
Video Editor notification: Screen_Recording_20260311_115526_One UI Home.mp4

attributes.text: Your account was reported for violating community guidelines. Let's verify your identity so we can get you back to dating.

By clicking the button below, you consent to CMB and to Persona, an identity verification company, collecting, using, and utilizing Persona's service providers to process your biometric identifiers and information to verify your identity, prevent identity fraud, and improve CMB's and Persona's platforms in accordance with CMB's Privacy Policy and Persona's Privacy Policy. Your biometric identifiers and information will be stored for the period of time required to satisfy these purposes, but for no more than 3 years after your last interaction with Persona, unless otherwise required by law or legal process to retain the data.
Start verifying identity

error.debugMessage:
Assertion 'id: com.coffeemeetsbagel:id/onboarding__next is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
